ab: Manga’ay kako a micaliw to payso iso haw?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: Nga’ayto, pina ko caliwen iso saw?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: Matawal ako a mihawikid ko payso, nga’ay a pacaliw to payso iso haw?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Caay ka pihawikid kako to payso.
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: Matawal ako a mihawikid ko payso, nga’ay a pacaliw to payso iso haw?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Na’ay, caayho ka patikor kiso toya i ’ayaway a payso.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: Manga’ay kako a micaliw to riko’ iso haw?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: Nga’ayto, ala han iso.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: Manga’ay kako a micaliw to cudad iso haw?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: Mapacaliwto ako ci Osay.
en: B: I lent it to Osay.

ab: Manga’ay a pacaliwen kako to koliciw iso haw?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: Nga’ay to, kawrira patikoren kako anopapacem.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: Ma’oradto, capihawikid kako to saong, nga’ay a pacaliw takowan to saong haw?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: Cecay ko saong ako, lacecay sa kita a misasaong.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: Oya mipacaliwan iso i’ayaw i takowan a cudad koni, patikoren ako kiso.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: O maanho ko nanengnengen iso a cudad, pasowal han kako.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: Ano hacowa a patikoren ako kiso to payso saw?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: Mimaan saw, ira sato ko payso iso, itiya hanto.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: Ano hacowa a patikor kiso to payso i takowan saw?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: Patikor hanto ako kiso anopapacem.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: Ano hacowa a patikor kiso to cudad i takowan saw?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: Mapatikorto ako inacila kiso kiyami?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: O nipacaliwan ni Kacaw i tisowanan a impic koninian haw?
en: A: Did Kacaw lend you this pen?

ab: Hai, o micaliwan ako anini i cingraan.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: O nicaliwan iso ci Kacawan a impic koninian haw?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Kacaw?

ab: Caay, o mi’acan no ina ako konini.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: Awaayto ko cinah, picaliw to cinah ci Panayan.
en: A: We're out of salt, go borrow some from Panay.

ab: Hayda, tayra kako a micaliw.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: Papipatikoren itakowanan to payso ci Panay.
en: B: Go tell Panay to pay me back.

ab: Pina ko tadah ningra i tisowanan saw?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
